case_title: TWO JINN, INC.DBA ALADDIN BAIL BONDS VS. MALIK NGUMEZI ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100042134) AS TO DEFENDANT NGUMEZI, MALIK DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
CLAIM OF EXEMPTION PACKET FROM SACRAMENTO COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE WAS RECEIVED.
CONFIDENTIAL STATEMENT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TWO JINN, INC.DBA ALADDIN BAIL BONDS
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-02-2020 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JUL-02-2020 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF TWO JINN, INC. DBA ALADDIN BAIL BONDS' HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING INSTRUCTED THE PARTIES TO APPEAR. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCES BY THE PARTIES, THE COURT ORDERS THIS MATTER OFF CALENDAR. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR# 6185, TONYVAUGHN@YAHOO.COM (302/EPS)
NOTICE OF ACTION TAKEN FOR AMENDED NOTICE OF HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION FROM SACRAMENTO COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE WAS RECEIVED. (CONFIDENTIAL)

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF TWO JINN, INC.DBA ALADDIN BAIL BONDS' HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION: DEFENDANT FRAZIER'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS ORDERED TO COLLECT $50/PAY PERIOD ($100/MONTH) FROM DEFENDANT'S WAGES TO SERVICE. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: CURTIS E KARNOW, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/CEK)

ORDER -[AMENDED]- DETERMINING CLAIM OF EXEMPTION -THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY EARNINGS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT. LEVYING OFFICER TO COLLECT $50.00/PAY PERIOD ($100.00 PER MONTH) FROM WAGES TO SERVICE THE DEBT.

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Aug-20-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF TWO JINN, INC.DBA ALADDIN BAIL BONDS' HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION:

Defendant Frazier's claim of exemption is granted. The levying officer is ordered to collect $50/pay period ($100/month) from defendant's wages to service.

order signed.

Judge: Curtis E Karnow, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/CEK)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jul-02-2020 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF TWO JINN, INC. DBA ALADDIN BAIL BONDS' HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

No appearances made by the parties. The Court's tentative ruling instructed the parties to appear. There being no appearances by the parties, the Court orders this matter off calendar.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR# 6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com (302/EPS)
